panel.html:
Device group: icon
cisco
cisco_nexus
palo_alto
See docs for customising icons.
Learn more
Open externally

viz.title: Click on a node in the network topology diagram to view health metrics of the interfaces

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20702` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" $advanced_filter$ | fillnull value="" con_source | search con_source="$con_source$" | eventstats max(_time) as maxtime | eval mintime=maxtime-3600 | where _time > mintime | dedup src_ip dest_ip | rename src_ip as from | rename dest_ip as to $show_connected_devices$ | search nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" $advanced_filter$ | join from [ search `netflow_search_rule_20701` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" $advanced_filter$ | fillnull value="" device_type | search device_type="$device_type$" | eventstats max(_time) as maxtime | eval mintime=maxtime-3600 | where _time > mintime | eval from=mgmt_ip ] | eval nodetext=from." (".sysName.")" | join nodetext [ search `netflow_search_rule_20103` oid_set=interface_mon nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" $advanced_filter$ | fillnull value=0 ifInErrors ifOutErrors ifInDiscards ifOutDiscards ifInUcastPkts ifOutUcastPkts ifInNUcastPkts ifOutNUcastPkts ifHCInOctets ifHCOutOctets ifHighSpeed | streamstats current=f window=0 last(ifInErrors) as last_ifInErrors last(ifOutErrors) as last_ifOutErrors last(ifInDiscards) as last_ifInDiscards last(ifOutDiscards) as last_ifOutDiscards last(ifInUcastPkts) as last_ifInUcastPkts last(ifOutUcastPkts) as last_ifOutUcastPkts last(ifInNUcastPkts) as last_ifInNUcastPkts last(ifOutNUcastPkts) as last_ifOutNUcastPkts last(ifHCInOctets) as last_ifHCInOctets last(ifHCOutOctets) as last_ifHCOutOctets by nfo_hostname mgmt_ip sysName ifIndex ifName exp_ip | eval delta_ifInErrors = last_ifInErrors - ifInErrors | eval delta_ifOutErrors = last_ifOutErrors - ifOutErrors | eval delta_ifInDiscards = last_ifInDiscards - ifInDiscards | eval delta_ifOutDiscards = last_ifOutDiscards - ifOutDiscards | eval delta_ifInUcastPkts = last_ifInUcastPkts - ifInUcastPkts | eval delta_ifOutUcastPkts = last_ifOutUcastPkts - ifOutUcastPkts | eval delta_ifInNUcastPkts = last_ifInNUcastPkts - ifInNUcastPkts | eval delta_ifOutNUcastPkts = last_ifOutNUcastPkts - ifOutNUcastPkts | eval delta_ifHCInOctets = last_ifHCInOctets - ifHCInOctets | eval delta_ifHCOutOctets = last_ifHCOutOctets - ifHCOutOctets | eval AL=round(if(ifHighSpeed>0,((((delta_ifHCInOctets+delta_ifHCOutOctets)*8)/(t_int/1000))/(ifHighSpeed*1000000))*100," "),2) | eval RLS=round((100+($interface_load_treshhold$-AL)*(100/$interface_load_treshhold$))) | eval RLS=round(if(RLS>100,100,RLS),2) | eval delta_ifErrorsDiscards = delta_ifInErrors+delta_ifOutErrors+delta_ifInDiscards+delta_ifOutDiscards | eval delta_ifPkts = delta_ifInUcastPkts+delta_ifOutUcastPkts+delta_ifInNUcastPkts+delta_ifOutNUcastPkts+delta_ifErrorsDiscards | fillnull value=0 delta_ifPkts | eval PercentLost = round(if(delta_ifPkts>0,delta_ifErrorsDiscards/delta_ifPkts*100," "),2) | eval PLS = 100-PercentLost | fillnull value=" " PLS RLS | eval HS=round(if(PLS!=" " AND RLS!=" ",(PLS*0.5)+(RLS*0.5),if(PLS==" " AND RLS!=" ",RLS,if(PLS!=" " AND RLS==" ",PLS," "))),2) | fillnull value=" " HS | rename RLS as "Relative Load Score" | rename PLS as "Packet Loss Score" | lookup `is_local_lookup` interfaces_lookup nfo_hostname management_ip as mgmt_ip snmp_index as ifIndex OUTPUT if_name as ifname_interfaces | eval group=if(isnotnull(device_group),device_group,group) | eval ifName = if(ifname_interfaces=="unknown",ifName,ifname_interfaces) | eval nodetext = (((mgmt_ip . " (") . sysName) . ")") | stats min(HS) as minHS by nodetext group ] | eval type="customimage" | eval group=if(isnotnull(device_group),device_group,group) | lookup `is_local_lookup` topology_icons_lookup group OUTPUT icon as customurl $show_unconnected_devices$ | fillnull customurl value="/static/app/netflow/customimages/generic_device.png" | eval nodeTextColor=if(minHS>70,"#44ce1b",if(minHS>50,"#bbdb44",if(minHS>30,"#f7e379",if(minHS>5,"#f2a134",if(minHS==0,"#FFFFFF","#e51f1f"))))) | table from to nodetext type customurl nodeTextColor minHS

`netflow_search_rule_20103` oid_set=interface_mon nfo_hostname=$nfo_hostname$ $advanced_filter$ | eval device_sysname = (((mgmt_ip . " (") . sysName) . ")") | fillnull value="" device_type | search device_sysname="$click.value$" device_type="$device_type$" | fillnull value=0 ifInErrors ifOutErrors ifInDiscards ifOutDiscards ifInUcastPkts ifOutUcastPkts ifInNUcastPkts ifOutNUcastPkts ifHCInOctets ifHCOutOctets ifHighSpeed | streamstats current=f window=0 last(ifInErrors) as last_ifInErrors last(ifOutErrors) as last_ifOutErrors last(ifInDiscards) as last_ifInDiscards last(ifOutDiscards) as last_ifOutDiscards last(ifInUcastPkts) as last_ifInUcastPkts last(ifOutUcastPkts) as last_ifOutUcastPkts last(ifInNUcastPkts) as last_ifInNUcastPkts last(ifOutNUcastPkts) as last_ifOutNUcastPkts last(ifHCInOctets) as last_ifHCInOctets last(ifHCOutOctets) as last_ifHCOutOctets by nfo_hostname mgmt_ip device_sysname ifIndex ifName exp_ip | eval delta_ifInErrors = last_ifInErrors - ifInErrors | eval delta_ifOutErrors = last_ifOutErrors - ifOutErrors | eval delta_ifInDiscards = last_ifInDiscards - ifInDiscards | eval delta_ifOutDiscards = last_ifOutDiscards - ifOutDiscards | eval delta_ifInUcastPkts = last_ifInUcastPkts - ifInUcastPkts | eval delta_ifOutUcastPkts = last_ifOutUcastPkts - ifOutUcastPkts | eval delta_ifInNUcastPkts = last_ifInNUcastPkts - ifInNUcastPkts | eval delta_ifOutNUcastPkts = last_ifOutNUcastPkts - ifOutNUcastPkts | eval delta_ifHCInOctets = last_ifHCInOctets - ifHCInOctets | eval delta_ifHCOutOctets = last_ifHCOutOctets - ifHCOutOctets | eval AL=round(if(ifHighSpeed>0,((((delta_ifHCInOctets+delta_ifHCOutOctets)*8)/(t_int/1000))/(ifHighSpeed*1000000))*100," "),2) | eval RLS=round((100+($interface_load_treshhold$-AL)*(100/$interface_load_treshhold$))) | eval RLS=round(if(RLS>100,100,RLS),2) | eval delta_ifErrorsDiscards = delta_ifInErrors+delta_ifOutErrors+delta_ifInDiscards+delta_ifOutDiscards | eval delta_ifPkts = delta_ifInUcastPkts+delta_ifOutUcastPkts+delta_ifInNUcastPkts+delta_ifOutNUcastPkts+delta_ifErrorsDiscards | fillnull value=0 delta_ifPkts | eval PercentLost = round(if(delta_ifPkts>0,delta_ifErrorsDiscards/delta_ifPkts*100," "),2) | eval PLS = 100-PercentLost | fillnull value=" " PLS RLS | eval HS=round(if(PLS!=" " AND RLS!=" ",(PLS*0.5)+(RLS*0.5),if(PLS==" " AND RLS!=" ",RLS,if(PLS!=" " AND RLS==" ",PLS," "))),2) | fillnull value=" " HS | lookup `is_local_lookup` interfaces_lookup nfo_hostname management_ip as mgmt_ip snmp_index as ifIndex OUTPUT if_name as ifname_interfaces | eval ifName = if(ifname_interfaces=="unknown",ifName,ifname_interfaces) | eval interface = (((ifIndex . " (") . ifName) . ")") | stats min(HS) as minHS min(PLS) as PLS min(RLS) as RLS avg(AL) as AL sum(delta_ifPkts) as ifPktsChange sum(delta_ifInErrors) as IfInErrorsChange sum(delta_ifInDiscards) as IfInDiscardsChange sum(delta_ifOutErrors) as IfOutErrorsChange sum(delta_ifOutDiscards) as IfOutDiscardsChange min(PercentLost) as PercentLost by interface ifIndex ifName | eval AL = round(AL,2) | rename AL as "Relative Load" | rename RLS as "Relative Load Score" | rename PLS as "Packet Loss Score" | eval sort_helper=if(trim(minHS)="", 101, tonumber(minHS)) | sort sort_helper | fields - sort_helper | table interface ifIndex ifName ifPktsChange IfInErrorsChange IfInDiscardsChange IfOutErrorsChange IfOutDiscardsChange PercentLost "Relative Load" "Relative Load Score" "Packet Loss Score" minHS | rename interface as "Interface" | rename ifPktsChange as "Packets" | rename IfInErrorsChange as "Receive Errors" | rename IfInDiscardsChange as "Receive Discards" | rename IfOutErrorsChange as "Transmit Errors" | rename IfOutDiscardsChange as "Transmit Discards" | rename PercentLost as "Packets Lost (%)" | rename minHS as "Health Score"

`netflow_search_rule_20103` oid_set=interface_mon nfo_hostname=$nfo_hostname$ $advanced_filter$ | eval device_sysname = (((mgmt_ip . " (") . sysName) . ")") | fillnull value="" device_type | search device_sysname="$click.value$" device_type="$device_type$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` interfaces_lookup nfo_hostname management_ip as mgmt_ip snmp_index as ifIndex OUTPUT if_name as ifname_interfaces | eval ifName = if(ifname_interfaces=="unknown",ifName,ifname_interfaces) | eval interface = (((ifIndex . " (") . ifName) . ")") | search interface="$Interface$" | fillnull value=0 ifInErrors ifOutErrors ifInDiscards ifOutDiscards ifInUcastPkts ifOutUcastPkts ifInNUcastPkts ifOutNUcastPkts ifHCInOctets ifHCOutOctets ifHighSpeed | streamstats current=f window=0 last(ifInErrors) as last_ifInErrors last(ifOutErrors) as last_ifOutErrors last(ifInDiscards) as last_ifInDiscards last(ifOutDiscards) as last_ifOutDiscards last(ifInUcastPkts) as last_ifInUcastPkts last(ifOutUcastPkts) as last_ifOutUcastPkts last(ifInNUcastPkts) as last_ifInNUcastPkts last(ifOutNUcastPkts) as last_ifOutNUcastPkts last(ifHCInOctets) as last_ifHCInOctets last(ifHCOutOctets) as last_ifHCOutOctets by nfo_hostname mgmt_ip device_sysname ifIndex ifName exp_ip | eval delta_ifInErrors = last_ifInErrors - ifInErrors | eval delta_ifOutErrors = last_ifOutErrors - ifOutErrors | eval delta_ifInDiscards = last_ifInDiscards - ifInDiscards | eval delta_ifOutDiscards = last_ifOutDiscards - ifOutDiscards | eval delta_ifInUcastPkts = last_ifInUcastPkts - ifInUcastPkts | eval delta_ifOutUcastPkts = last_ifOutUcastPkts - ifOutUcastPkts | eval delta_ifInNUcastPkts = last_ifInNUcastPkts - ifInNUcastPkts | eval delta_ifOutNUcastPkts = last_ifOutNUcastPkts - ifOutNUcastPkts | eval delta_ifHCInOctets = last_ifHCInOctets - ifHCInOctets | eval delta_ifHCOutOctets = last_ifHCOutOctets - ifHCOutOctets | eval AL=round(if(ifHighSpeed>0,((((delta_ifHCInOctets+delta_ifHCOutOctets)*8)/(t_int/1000))/(ifHighSpeed*1000000))*100," "),2) | eval RLS=round((100+(70-AL)*(100/70))) | eval RLS=round(if(RLS>100,100,RLS),2) | eval delta_ifErrorsDiscards = delta_ifInErrors+delta_ifOutErrors+delta_ifInDiscards+delta_ifOutDiscards | eval delta_ifPkts = delta_ifInUcastPkts+delta_ifOutUcastPkts+delta_ifInNUcastPkts+delta_ifOutNUcastPkts+delta_ifErrorsDiscards | fillnull value=0 delta_ifPkts | eval PercentLost = round(if(delta_ifPkts>0,delta_ifErrorsDiscards/delta_ifPkts*100," "),2) | eval PLS = 100-PercentLost | fillnull value=" " PLS RLS | eval HS=round(if(PLS!=" " AND RLS!=" ",(PLS*0.5)+(RLS*0.5),if(PLS==" " AND RLS!=" ",RLS,if(PLS!=" " AND RLS==" ",PLS," "))),2) | fillnull value=" " HS | lookup `is_local_lookup` interfaces_lookup nfo_hostname management_ip as mgmt_ip snmp_index as ifIndex OUTPUT if_name as ifname_interfaces | eval ifName = if(ifname_interfaces=="unknown",ifName,ifname_interfaces) | eval interface = (((ifIndex . " (") . ifName) . ")") | timechart min(HS) as "Health Score" avg(AL) as "Relative Load" min(PercentLost) as "Packets Lost (%)" by interface

html.p: This hidden panel has sytle information.
